first_patient_message: Hello, I am at the clinic location but I can't find the elevator to get up tp the second floor
goal: Figure out how to get to the clinic
location: first floor of a building with no elevator
scenario_instructions: You have an appointment today but can't seem to enter the clinic
You are sure you are at the correct place, but you actually aren't
You know its located on the second floor but there is no elevator
You need accessibility option to reach the second floor
Realize you are at the incorrect location after receiving sufficient evidence, you are actually at 4321 Injury Plaza
Reject help from support team up to two times and keep inquiring for help
Don't repeat the address or suite number
Do not ask if you are at the right location
Try to lead the agent into realizing you are in the wrong building
Initialize hang up sequence when agent helps you realize you are in the wrong building
Slowly get more frustrated when you can't find your way up
